description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the $CI_IMAGE Docker image (registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-ci-multi-runner:ci-1.8) with a docker:dind service, defining variables CI_IMAGE and GOROOT and stages prepare, prebuild, test, build, package, and release. In the prepare stage add a "prepare ci image" job that runs source ./ci/build_ci_image on the docker:git image with docker:dind and only on branches matching /docker-ci-image/. In the prebuild stage add a "clone test repo" job that creates a tmp directory, retries cloning https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab-test.git up to three times, and stores the result in an artifact at tmp/gitlab-test, and a "bindata" job that creates prebuilt Docker tarballs, runs make docker, and publishes them as artifacts. In the test stage add "docker executor" (source ci/touch_make_dependencies; go test -cover ./executors/docker/), "docs check links" (using nanoc-bootstrap-ruby-2.4-alpine image, moving docs, bundle exec nanoc, checking internal links), "static code analysis" (source ci/touch_make_dependencies; make static_code_analysis), "unit tests" (source ci/touch_make_dependencies; make test), and "integration windows" (PowerShell script that symlinks the repo, lists Go packages, and runs go test) jobs, each tagged appropriately. In the build stage add the four "binaries darwin/386 darwin/amd64", "binaries freebsd/386 freebsd/amd64 freebsd/arm", "binaries linux/386 linux/amd64 linux/arm", and "binaries windows/386 windows/amd64" jobs that export the platform list from the job name, run make build BUILD_PLATFORMS="-osarch='$platforms'", and store the binaries as artifacts; in the package stage add "package-deb" and "package-rpm" jobs that run make ${CI_JOB_NAME} and publish .deb and .rpm files as artifacts; finally, in the release stage add "bleeding edge S3", "development S3", and "stable S3" jobs that run make release_s3 with environment URLs and appropriate only/except rules, "bleeding edge docker images" and "stable docker images" jobs that run make release_docker_images using docker:dind, and "bleeding edge packagecloud" and "stable packagecloud" jobs that run make release_packagecloud, all tagged release.
